operator_lock: Adam — BuilderOS only (not LifeRE product). 10/10 = real loop, not theater.
benchmark: Envision → program → self-repair → compound improve — without fake green.

envisioned_workflow.label: Works as BuilderOS machine (mission → blueprint → build → receipt)

real_programming.label: Can program — commits code via canonical harness with routing

self_repair.label: Fixes itself — detect, classify, repair codegen + ops failures

compound_improvement.label: Improves itself — every failure logs a lever; platform compounds

execution_tiers.MECHANICAL: Blueprint step with target_file + acceptance_test_ids — skip ARC/IDC/post-ARC HARD gates
execution_tiers.PLATFORM: BuilderOS spine changes — deliberation + safe-scope + kernel wrap

honesty_law: Structural 10/10 = wiring exists. Operational 10/10 = live ready + gap health + repair proof + compound from production failures. Calling structural operational is fake green.
